response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically versatile software engineer with roughly 15 years of experience, but the role demands a Director-level individual contributor with deep, recognized AI expertise and a track record of advising strategic customers and shaping cloud platform strategy. His AI involvement is recent and limited to tooling support work at re:cinq (MCP generators, agentic workflow frameworks), with no evidence of having built or led recognized AI products or platforms. His background skews heavily toward full-stack application development rather than AI/ML research, cloud architecture strategy, or executive-level technical leadership, making him a poor fit for this role's seniority and focus.
strengths: Genuine entrepreneurial background as founder of GISCollective, demonstrating initiative and long-term ownership of an open-source platform
Broad polyglot engineering skills across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, indicating adaptability across domains
Current role at re:cinq includes direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, showing he is actively engaging with the AI ecosystem
concerns: No demonstrated recognition or thought leadership in AI — no publications, major AI products, patents, or conference presence at an AI-focused level
Titles across the resume are Senior/Staff engineer; there is no evidence of Director-level IC scope, executive customer advisory experience, or strategic influence at scale
Cloud expertise is shallow — AWS CDK usage at Optilyz is the only cloud reference; no evidence of cloud platform architecture, multi-cloud strategy, or cloud product ownership
